description: Public-safe starter schema for telemetry in highly interactive digital learning environments. Extend the payload object for each environment.

privacy_tiers.low: Pseudonymous interaction event with no free text, media, biometrics, or precise body traces.
privacy_tiers.moderate: Free-text rationale, open response, or derived feature that may reveal sensitive information.
privacy_tiers.sensitive: Raw audio, video, face, gaze, biometric, exact location, or directly identifying data.
